hero.headline: Welcome to
hero.tagline: Experience the flavours of India — crafted with care, served with passion.

about.label: Our Story
about.title: More Than a Restaurant
about.body: Jilebi was born from a deep love for Indian cuisine. Each dish tells a story — of spice-scented markets, of family recipes passed down through generations, and of a desire to bring authentic Indian hospitality to Nürtingen. We use fresh, hand-picked ingredients and prepare everything daily from scratch.

reservation.label: Reserve a Table
reservation.title: Book a Table
reservation.no_slots: No tables available on this day.
reservation.success_body: We have received your request and will send you a confirmation by email.
reservation.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

email.confirm_body: We look forward to welcoming you. Here are your booking details:
email.cancel_body: Unfortunately your reservation has been cancelled. Please contact us to make a new booking.
